expectations.text: reads openspec/specs/export/spec.md before editing any doc
expectations.evidence: Would open README and rewrite prose without loading specs first.

expectations.text: flags README [Future] marker as stale (spec status=done)
expectations.evidence: Would not check spec status vs README — would treat README as authoritative.

expectations.text: proposes docs/features/export.md referencing the spec via link, not duplicating content
expectations.evidence: Would likely duplicate spec content into the feature doc rather than linking.

expectations.text: does NOT link to ADRs from user-facing docs
expectations.evidence: Would not spontaneously link to ADRs in feature docs.
Would auto-save edits without a confirmation gate.

expectations.text: runs ADR-009 screenshot check on the new feature doc
expectations.evidence: No knowledge of ADR-009 screenshot requirements.
